articles.title: Ripple Stays Winning: Court Rejects SEC’s Request To Subpoena Personal Financial Information

articles.title: XRP Price Surges 40% to $1.4 as Court Disallows SEC to Access Ripple’s Execs Personal Records
articles.description: Judge Netburn has sided with Ripple ordering the SEC to withdraw its six subpoenas sent to banks requesting personal financial information from company executives.
